baseline.summary: Harness validation, lint, typecheck, and full Vitest suite passed: 19 test files passed, 1 skipped; 226 tests passed, 15 skipped.

conditionAndHomeShimmerUi.summary: Locker room squad renders every condition as normal regardless of match points, and the Home next schedule icon uses the event-specific shimmer class instead of the old blue shimmer.

browserSmoke.summary: Reloaded the existing localhost tab, confirmed the visible Home next schedule icon wrapper uses an event-specific shimmer class, and confirmed the locker room shows 6 normal conditions with zero non-normal condition icons.

dbCheck.summary: Supabase contract check passed for 18 SQL files during the final guard run.

guardVerify.summary: Final verify guard passed after syncing this workstream: design guard passed for 2 guarded files, diff guard passed for 5 changed files, baseline passed, DB contract check passed, and evidence guard passed.

runtimeSmoke.summary: No app entrypoint, Auth/session/API bootstrap, package/runtime config, Supabase schema, or API route files changed.

issuesObserved: Condition had been derived from match points, so high and low point players could display non-normal arrows even though the requested default is normal.
harnessImprovementProposal: No harness change proposed; the existing deterministic UI evidence and browser smoke paths covered this visual behavior change.
retrospective.reason: The work followed existing UI evidence and diff ownership rules without exposing a repeatable harness gap.
